work_unit: PA-B2-H-001: cli.py default bind 0.0.0.0 → 127.0.0.1 + unauth warning
situation: Deep audit audit-2026-07-08-045 found cli.py serve subcommand defaults to --host 0.0.0.0. When PA_API_TOKEN is unset (dev mode), auth middleware bypasses all endpoints. Binding to all interfaces exposes every API endpoint to the local network without authentication.
action: Changed argparse default from '0.0.0.0' to '127.0.0.1'. Added startup warning in cmd_serve when host != loopback and PA_API_TOKEN is unset, printing to stderr. Minimal 1-file fix.
outcome_evidence: opt-worktree.sh committed + pushed auto/opt-cli-1783391471 to origin. Diff: line 190 default='127.0.0.1', lines 130-140 added non-loopback unauth warning.
next_suggestion: 派生下一个 pending route-fix: PA-B2-H-003 (reminders recurring ID collision)
或 PA-B2-M-001 (reminders notify-before-mark race) — 可与 H-003 合并修

audit_findings.finding: Default --host 0.0.0.0 exposes all endpoints to network when PA_API_TOKEN unset (dev mode bypasses auth)
audit_findings.remediation: Change default to 127.0.0.1; add startup warning for non-loopback without token
